## Quick Comparison

Iterable vs. Braze

### Iterable

AI Customer Engagement Platform

Iterable is the AI-powered customer communications platform that empowers brands like Redfin, Priceline, Calm, and Box create joyful, personalized customer experiences at scale. With Iterable, organizations unlock growth in the digital era with individualized, harmonized and dynamic communications that engage customers throughout the entire lifecycle at the right time.

### Braze

Customer Engagement Platform

Braze is a customer engagement platform used by brands for messaging across mobile, email, in-app etc., but customers often find limitations in terms of data flexibility, precision of AI-assisted personalization, and speed of launching complex journeys without engineering.
